name: housecallpro-mcp
description: MCP server and skills for the Housecall Pro public API

api_key.title: Housecall Pro API key
api_key.description: API key from Housecall Pro — required only for apikey auth method

client_secret.title: Housecall Pro client secret
client_secret.description: OAuth client secret from Housecall Pro — required only for oauth auth method

client_id.title: Housecall Pro client ID
client_id.description: OAuth client ID from Housecall Pro — required only for oauth auth method

oauth_token.title: Housecall Pro OAuth token
oauth_token.description: OAuth access token from Housecall Pro — required only for oauth auth method
